series_metadata.series_title: Real Estate, Appraiser, AMC, Home Inspector, Land Professionals and Cemetery - No Jurisdiction
series_metadata.series_description: This retention schedule pertains to records received by the Division regarding a complaint against a registered, licensed or certified appraiser, appraisal management company, home inspector, land professional, real estate licensee, foreign real estate licensee, a cemetery or a person identified in an unlicensed activity complaint (ORC 4735.052, 4764.16 or 4768.14) which the Division closed because the Division did not have jurisdiction over the matter. This retention schedule includes, but is not limited to, the complaint, correspondence with the Respondent and the Complainant and any proof of service.

retention_rules.trigger_event: Paper: Paper records are retained disciplinary file is closed at administrative level - date of Division''''''''s final notice. is closed at administrative level - date of Division''''''''s final notice. paper record may be shredded. ; Electronic: any records maintained in machine readable format, records shall be maintained one year disciplinary file is closed on administrative level - date of Division''''''''s final notice. , records shall be destroyed. ; Microform: any records maintained in microform, records shall be maintained one year disciplinary file is closed on administrative level - date of Division''''''''s final notice. , records shall be destroyed
retention_rules.disposition_method: Paper: Shred ; Electronic: Erase ; Microform: Shred
